projects.name: vemi
projects.description: a tiny, type-safe markdown compiler. plain text in, html out; it powers the article pipeline on this site.

projects.name: chrome dino learns to run
projects.description: a neural network trained to play chrome's offline dino game, built as the demo project for an in-depth computer science video on neural networks.

projects.name: mips processor from first principles
projects.description: a single-cycle mips processor implementation that walks through datapath, control, and instruction execution from the ground up.

projects.name: stack over papers
projects.description: an open community and repository for exploring, discussing, and annotating computer science papers and technical readings, making research more accessible and collaborative.

projects.name: nudge
projects.description: lightweight self-motivation daemon that sends you randomized, time-blocked messages throughout the day.

projects.name: fauthy
projects.description: an open-source and secure command-line totp manager with local encryption.
